iterations.theme: Listening to Your Soul: A Lenten Reflection on Self-Care and Spiritual Growth
iterations.reason_for_cut: The entire podcast is 15 minutes and 46 seconds long, which is shorter than the requested minimum iteration length of 35-45 minutes. Therefore, the entire content is contained within a single thematic block.

chapters.topic: Introduction: Date, 40 Martyrs, and the approaching Easter
The Core Question: 'What can I do so this Lent doesn't pass in vain?'
The Soul's Plea: 'My soul, what do you want me to do for you until Easter?'
Listening to the Soul vs. Body: Understanding the soul's neglected cries
Self-Reflection for Lent: Questions about fasting, prayer, purpose, and self-love
Identity and Impact: Being a happy, joyful person who helps others
The Power of Words: An anecdote and reflection on positive vs. negative communication
Renunciation for Spiritual Growth: What to give up until Easter and for life
Zrinka's Soul: 'Be still, listen to your inner self.'
Ana Marija's Soul: 'Revive me, love yourself, accept yourself.'
Nada's Soul: 'You no longer weep, you rest in Jesus' hand.'
Valentina's Soul: 'Give me more silence and peace, live through me.'
Speaker_01's Soul: 'Fill my time with quality, face fears, spread love, find a kindred spirit.'
